forGracePeriod.description:
forGracePeriod defines the minimum duration between alert and restored 'for' state.

This is maintained only for alerts with a configured 'for' time greater than the grace period.

forOutageTolerance.description: forOutageTolerance defines the max time to tolerate prometheus outage for restoring 'for' state of alert.

resendDelay.description: resendDelay defines the minimum amount of time to wait before resending an alert to Alertmanager.
